name: @cntryl/fitz
description: TypeScript client library for Fitz distributed system

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:node && npm run build:browser && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:node: vp pack src/index.node.ts --format esm,cjs --platform node --out-dir dist/node --clean --sourcemap --deps.never-bundle ws
scripts.build:browser: vp pack src/index.browser.ts --format esm --platform browser --out-dir dist/browser --no-clean --sourcemap
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:conformance
scripts.verify:fast: npm run fmt:check && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:unit
scripts.verify: npm run verify:fast && npm run test:integration && npm run test:conformance
scripts.bench: npm run bench:tier1 && npm run bench:tier2 && npm run bench:tier3 && npm run bench:tier4
scripts.bench:tier1: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vp exec vitest bench --run --project tier1 --reporter=default --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 benches/tier1/*.bench.ts
scripts.bench:tier2: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vp exec vitest bench --run --project tier2 --reporter=default --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 benches/tier2/*.bench.ts
scripts.bench:tier3: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vp exec vitest bench --run --project tier3 --reporter=default --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 benches/tier3/*.bench.ts
scripts.bench:tier4: cross-env NODE_ENV=production vp exec vitest bench --run --project tier4 --reporter=default --no-file-parallelism --maxWorkers=1 benches/tier4/*.bench.ts
scripts.bench:stable:tier1: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/bench-artifacts.js stable --tiers tier1
scripts.bench:stable:tier2: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/bench-artifacts.js stable --tiers tier2
scripts.bench:stable:tier3: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/bench-artifacts.js stable --tiers tier3
scripts.bench:stable:tier4: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/bench-artifacts.js stable --tiers tier4
